zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Augusta Dalassène於1025年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾時，她的父親Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy36歲，母親Adriana Augusta Dalassène11022歲。她於大約1044年與John Komnene Domestic of the Schools在白展丁 艾皮爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1100年11月1日在亞西婭享年75歲，埋葬在義大利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Augusta Dalassène于1025年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾时，她的父亲Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy36岁，母亲Adriana Augusta Dalassène11022岁。她于大约1044年与John Komnene Domestic of the Schools在白展丁 艾皮爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1100年11月1日在亞西婭享年75岁，埋葬在意大利。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Augusta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Augustus  , which enjoyed a vogue in Britain towards the end of the 19th century but has since fallen out of favour.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Augusta Dalassène was born in 1025, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, her father, Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy, was 36 and her mother, Adriana Augusta Dalassène, was 11022. She married John Komnene Domestic of the Schools about 1044, in Byzantine Empire. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 November 1100, in Asia, at the age of 75, and was buried in Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Augusta Dalassène est née en 1025, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adriana Augusta Dalassène, avait 11022 ans. Elle a épousé John Komnene Domestic of the Schools environ 1044, à Empire byzantin. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 novembre 1100, à L'Asie, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Augusta Dalassène 1025 in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy 36 und ihre Mutter Adriana Augusta Dalassène 11022. Sie hat um 1044 in Byzantinisches Reich John Komnene Domestic of the Schools geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. November 1100 im Alter von 75 Jahren in L'Asie und wurde in Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Augusta Dalassène è nata il nel 1025 nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, sua padre, Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Adriana Augusta Dalassène, aveva 11022 anni. Lei sposato John Komnene Domestic of the Schools circa 1044, nel Impero bizantino. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 novembre 1100, nel L'Asie, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Augusta Dalassèneが1025年にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Alexios Charon Prefect of Italyは36歳，母Adriana Augusta Dalassèneは11022歳であった。約1044年に東ローマ帝国でJohn Komnene Domestic of the Schoolsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1100年11月1日にアシアで75歳で死去し，イタリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Augusta Dalassène(이)가 1025년 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adriana Augusta Dalassène(은)는 11022세였다. 그녀는 대략 1044년 비자틴 피르에서 John Komnene Domestic of the Schools(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1100년 11월 1일 아샤에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Augusta Dalassène nasceu em 1025, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adriana Augusta Dalassène, tinha 11022 anos. Ela casou-se com John Komnene Domestic of the Schools aproximadamente 1044, em Império Bizantino. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1100, em L'Asie, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Augusta Dalassène родилась в 1025 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция, её отцу по имени Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adriana Augusta Dalassène, 11022. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Komnene Domestic of the Schools около 1044 г. в местности Византийская империя. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 ноября 1100 г. в местности ася в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Augusta Dalassène nació en 1025, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Alexios Charon Prefect of Italy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adriana Augusta Dalassène, tenía 11022 años. Se casó con John Komnene Domestic of the Schools aproximadamente 1044, en Imperio bizantino. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1100, en Asia, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Italia.
